quotes.text_surface: Put an end once for all to this discussion of what a good man should be, and be one.
quotes.text_full: Put an end once for all to this discussion of what a good man should be, and be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text_surface: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.
quotes.text_full: The Happiness of your Life depends upon the Quality of your Thoughts, therefore guard accordingly.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius
quotes.source_work: The Emperor Marcus Antoninus: His Conversation with Himself

quotes.text_surface: Thou shouldest have these two readinesses always at hand...
quotes.text_full: Thou shouldest have these two readinesses always at hand; the one... to do only what thy reason... shall suggest... the other to change thy mind, if one be near to set thee right.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text_surface: First say to yourself Who you wish to be: then do accordingly what you are doing.
quotes.text_full: First say to yourself Who you wish to be: then do accordingly what you are doing.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text_surface: It is not the things themselves that disturb men, but their judgements about these things.
quotes.text_full: It is not the things themselves that disturb men, but their judgements about these things.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text_surface: Some things are under our control, while others are not under our control.
quotes.text_full: Some things are under our control, while others are not under our control.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text_surface: Man, if you are worth anything, you must walk alone.
quotes.text_full: Man, if you are worth anything, you must walk alone, and talk to yourself and not hide in the chorus.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text_surface: Life is long, if we know how to use it.
quotes.text_full: Life is long, if we know how to use it.
quotes.author: Seneca
quotes.source_ref: quoted in The Great Didactic, Chapter 15

quotes.text_surface: While we are postponing, life speeds by.
quotes.text_full: While we are postponing, life speeds by.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text_surface: Begin at once to live, and count each separate day as a separate life.
quotes.text_full: Begin at once to live, and count each separate day as a separate life.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text_surface: Finish each day and be done with it.
quotes.text_full: Finish each day and be done with it. You have done what you could.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text_surface: 君子求諸己，小人求諸人。
quotes.text_full: 君子求諸己，小人求諸人。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text_surface: 欲速則不達。
quotes.text_full: 無欲速，無見小利。欲速則不達，見小利則大事不成。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text_surface: 己欲立而立人，己欲達而達人。
quotes.text_full: 夫仁者，己欲立而立人，己欲達而達人。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text_surface: 過而不改，是謂過矣。
quotes.text_full: 過而不改，是謂過矣。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text_surface: 道在邇而求諸遠，事在易而求之難。
quotes.text_full: 道在邇而求諸遠，事在易而求之難。
quotes.author: 孟子

quotes.text_surface: 自暴者，不可與有言也；自棄者，不可與有為也。
quotes.text_full: 自暴者，不可與有言也；自棄者，不可與有為也。
quotes.author: 孟子

quotes.text_surface: 仁，人之安宅也；義，人之正路也。
quotes.text_full: 仁，人之安宅也；義，人之正路也。
quotes.author: 孟子

quotes.text_surface: 千里之行，始於足下。
quotes.text_full: 合抱之木，生於毫末；九層之臺，起於累土；千里之行，始於足下。
quotes.author: 老子

quotes.text_surface: 慎終如始，則無敗事。
quotes.text_full: 民之從事，常於幾成而敗之。慎終如始，則無敗事。
quotes.author: 老子

quotes.text_surface: 為之於未有，治之於未亂。
quotes.text_full: 為之於未有，治之於未亂。
quotes.author: 老子

quotes.text_surface: 苟日新，日日新，又日新。
quotes.text_full: 苟日新，日日新，又日新。
quotes.author: 《大學》

quotes.text_surface: 凡事豫則立，不豫則廢。
quotes.text_full: 凡事豫則立，不豫則廢。
quotes.author: 《中庸》
